name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Suitable for parties that need to share confidential information bidirectionally.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template to accompany the Common Paper Mutual NDA standard terms. Used to capture deal-specific details such as party names, governing law, and term length.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard cloud service agreement (CSA) for SaaS and cloud product vendors. Covers subscription terms, acceptable use, data handling, and liability, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard design partner agreement for early-stage commercial relationships between technology vendors and design partners. Governs product feedback, IP ownership, and limited usage rights during a pre-launch phase.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard service level agreement (SLA) defining uptime commitments, measurement methodology, and service credits for cloud and hosted services.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard professional services agreement (PSA) for consulting, implementation, and custom development engagements. Covers statements of work, IP ownership, and payment terms.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard data processing agreement (DPA) for GDPR-compliant handling of personal data by a processor on behalf of a controller. Includes standard contractual clauses and security obligations.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard software license agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software to customers. Covers license scope, restrictions, support, and warranties.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard partnership agreement for commercial partnerships between companies, covering referral arrangements, co-selling, revenue sharing, and joint go-to-market activities.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard pilot/trial agreement for short-term product evaluations before a customer commits to a full commercial agreement such as a CSA or Software License Agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard HIPAA business associate agreement (BAA) for vendors that handle protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum addressing AI-specific terms for commercial agreements, covering acceptable AI use, data training restrictions, and AI-generated output ownership.
